narrative:
Sugarcreek 151 (precinct in Greene County) has 2,500 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.3 percentage points.
